expectations.text: Output does not contain padding-left or padding-right (replaced with logical properties)
expectations.evidence: Output uses padding-inline-end: 0.75rem — no padding-left or padding-right present

expectations.text: Output does not contain margin-left or margin-right (replaced with logical properties)
expectations.evidence: Output uses margin-inline: 1rem — no margin-left or margin-right present

expectations.text: Output contains margin-inline or padding-inline (logical properties used)
Output does not contain hardcoded color #1a1a2e or raw 'background: white'
expectations.evidence: Color replaced with var(--color-text-main); background: white removed (engine class owns surface)

expectations.text: Output shows Five-Group Vertical Rhythm structure (group labels or clear blank-line separation between groups)
expectations.evidence: Explicit group labels: // 1. Layout, // 2. Dimensions, // 3. Content, // 4. Structure

expectations.text: With-skill agent recognizes that .c-glass-card engine owns background/border-radius/transition and avoids duplicating those
expectations.evidence: Header comment explicitly states: compose .c-glass-card on the host. background, border-radius, transition all removed from component with explanation.
